signals.headline: Fed Chair Jerome Powell Confirms He Will Remain as Chair Pro Tem Until Successor Confirmed, Amid Ongoing Investigation|
signals.raw:
Fed Chair Jerome Powell Confirms He Will Remain as Chair Pro Tem Until Successor Confirmed, Amid Ongoing Investigation| NO | HIGH confidence**  
Jerome Powell stated during a March 18, 2026, FOMC press conference that he will serve as **Fed Chair pro tem** if his successor (Kevin Warsh, nominated by Trump) is not confirmed by his term's end on May 15, 2026, per federal law and precedent.[1][2][3][
